metaData.Ingredients:
Wheat Flour, D-Maltitol Powder, Whole Egg Liquid, Polyglycitol Syrup, Shortening I [Processed Oil(Esterification Of Palm Kernel Oil, Palm Fraction Oil, Esterification Of Palm Stearin Oil), Vegetable Oil(Palm Oil,Palm Stearin Oil, Palm Olein Oil), Glycerin Esters Of Fatty Acids(E471), Lecithin (E322), D-Tocopherol Concentrate(Mixed)(E306)], Shortening Ii [Processed Oil(Esterification Of Palm Kernel Oil, Esterification Of Palm Oil, Esterification Of Palm Stearin Oil), Palm Oil, Beef Tallow, Palm Stearin Oil, Lecithin (E322), D-Tocopherol Concentrate(Mixed) (E306)], Water, Shortening Iii [Rapeseed Oil, Propylene Glycol Esters Of Fatty Acids (E477),Glycerin Esters Of Fatty Acids (E471), Lecithin (E322), D-Tocopherol Concentrate(Mixed) (E306)], Cocoa Mass, Torte [Soybean Oil, D-Sorbitol Solution (E420), Glycerin Esters Of Fatty Acids (E471), Propylene Glycol Esters Of Fatty Acids (E477), Ethanol, Sucrose Esters Of Fatty Acids (E473), Mixed Formulation(Ε-Polylysine, Glycerin, Ethanol), Water], Cocoa Powder, Processed Grain [Wheat Flour, Starch, Glutinous Rice], Wheat Protein, Modified Starch I [Distarch Phosphate (E1412), Dextrin (E1400)], Chicory Root Extract, Modified Starch Ii [Hydroxypropyl Distarch Phosphate (E1442), Dextrin (E1400)], Camembert Cheese Powder [Cheese Powder(Milk, Salt, Lactic Acid Bacteria, Milk Clottingenzyme), Sodium Phosphate(Dibasic) (E339Ii)], Acidity Regulator [Sodium Bicarbonate(E500Ii), Ammonium Bicarbonate(E503Ii),Potassium Phosphate(Monobasic) (E336I)], Ethanol, Dried Albumin, Glycerin (E422), Coconut Cream Powder [Coconut Milk, Maltodextrin, Sodium Caseinate], Milk Cream, Mixed Formulation [Alcohol, Water, Lactic Acid (E270), Glycerin Esters Of Fatty Acids (E471), Sodium Lactate (E325)], Salt, Artificial Flavor [Condensed Milk Flavor, Chocolate Flavor, Vanilla Flavor, Caramel Flavor, Milk Cream Flavor, Masking Flavor], Rum, Coffee Powder, Emulsifier [Lecithin (E322), Glycerin Esters Of Fatty Acids (E471)], Sucralose (E955), Acesulfame Potassium (E950), Vanillin

∙ Allergy Information: Wheat(Cereals Containing Gluten), Milk, Soybean, Beef, Egg, Coconut
∙ Cross-Contamination: Pork, Peanut, Tree Nut(Almond, Hazelnut), Sulfites

metaData.Key Information: Tau sar piah or mung bean paste pastry is a traditional Teochew favourite, made by first steaming mung (green) beans and then frying the steamed bean paste with oil and sugar. The resulting fragrant bean paste is then encrusted in a thin flaky crust.
metaData.SAP Product Name: Delyco Salty Mung Bean Cake - Bundle of 2
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place.

metaData.Key Information:
Made in modern and hygienic environment, these delightful delicacies are sure to please even the most discerning of taste buds!
Prepared from fresh tropical pineapples with no added preservatives, the delicious tasty natural sweetness is encased in a fragrant crust that melts in the mouth.
An uniquely eggless and irresistible treat for all occasions.
A Quality Product of Singapore.

product.description:
WuGuFeng’s Gift Pastry Master Bruce LEI, uses only carefully selected top-grade juicy pineapples meat, without the core, to prepare the most fragrant paste which he then wrapped in full buttery, paranakan-styled crust and then meticulously press these pineapple balls into the shape of a stable cube before he bakes them into a nice golden brown tone. What is interesting about this item is its attractive Peranakan Packaging. It’s plentiful colours is beautiful and most representative of the unique multi cross-cultures of Singapore! This product is specially designed and engineered in 2015 to celebrate Singapore’s Nation-Building 50th Anniversary. It has now become a highly sort-after & “must buy” Gourmet Gift by many locals, business travellers & casual tourists alike. 

3 box colours : Rose Quartz Pink, Tiffiny Blue and Royal Yellow. MOQ : 6 boxes

metaData.Key Information:
Juicy pineapple meat without the core is cooked into fragrant paste.
Wrapped in buttery Peranakan-style crust and baked into golden cubes.
Presented in colourful gift packaging that celebrates Singapore’s heritage.
metaData.SAP Product Name: WuGuFeng Peranakan Pineapple Cakes 2pcs Gift Box
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place

product.name: WuGuFeng Peranakan Pineapple Cakes 2pcs Gift Box

tags.name: Marketplace
tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

metaData.Key Information:
Made in a modern, hygienic environment, these pineapple treats are naturally sweet with no preservatives, wrapped in a buttery, melt-in-the-mouth crust.

Presented in the Orchid Gift Box featuring Vanda Miss Joaquim, Singapore’s national flower, symbolizing vibrancy, resilience, and the Singapore spirit.

A quality product of Singapore.
metaData.SAP Product Name: Yue Yan Special Pineapple Cake - Gift Box (Orchid)
metaData.Storage Information: Cool, dry, ambient temperature of not more than 24⁰C

product.description:
Perfect as a thoughtful souvenir or a heartfelt gift for loved ones.
WuGuFeng’s Gift Pastry Master Bruce LEI, uses only carefully selected top-grade juicy pineapples meat, without the core, to prepare the most fragrant paste which he then wrapped in full buttery, paranakan-styled crust and then meticulously press these pineapple balls into the shape of a stable cube before he bakes them into a nice golden brown tone.

What is interesting about this item is its attractive Peranakan Packaging. It’s plentiful colours is beautiful and most representative of the unique multi cross-cultures of Singapore! This product is specially designed and engineered in 2015 to celebrate Singapore’s Nation-Building 50th Anniversary.

It has now become a highly sort-after & “must buy” Gourmet Gift by many locals, business travellers & casual tourists alike.

3 box colours : Rose Quartz Pink, Tiffiny Blue and Royal Yellow.

metaData.Key Information:
Perfect as a thoughtful souvenir or heartfelt gift for loved ones.
Filled with fragrant pineapple paste wrapped in buttery Peranakan-style crust.
Beautifully baked into golden cubes and packed in vibrant heritage-themed boxes.
metaData.SAP Product Name: WuGuFeng Peranakan Pineapple Cakes 6pcs Gift Box
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place
